stories.h: Anthropic's Fable 5 sweeps new agentic-work benchmark suite
stories.s: The new eval measures week-long jobs, not puzzles — and the gap between labs is widening.
b: Tops all 8 categories including multi-repo software work and research synthesis.
Benchmark built by a third-party consortium to resist gaming.
Enterprise agent adoption cited as the driver for the new tier.

stories.h: Leak: Google's Gemini 4 targeting September launch
stories.s: The fall frontier-model season is shaping up — three major releases expected within weeks of each other.
b: Internal benchmarks reportedly show large agentic gains.
Deep integration with Workspace agents planned at launch.

stories.h: Senate schedules first hearings on AI job displacement
stories.s: Washington shifts from "is AI safe?" to "what about the jobs?" — a different, harder debate.
b: Hearings begin in September with lab CEOs invited.
Follows BLS data showing white-collar hiring slowdown in exposed roles.

stories.h: Midjourney v8 adds full conversational scene editing
stories.s: "Move the lamp, make it dusk" now just works — image editing is becoming a dialogue.
b: Edits preserve scene consistency across unlimited revisions.
Still no API — community pressure continues.

stories.h: Six Chinese AI labs publish joint frontier-safety framework
stories.s: Echoes Western labs' commitments — and complicates the "race means no safety" narrative.
b: Includes compute thresholds that trigger safety evaluations.
DeepSeek, Alibaba, and Zhipu among signatories.

stories.h: AI tutoring gains hold up a full year later, follow-up study finds
stories.s: The learning gains weren't a novelty effect — big news for the ed-tech thesis.
b: Students kept a 0.3 standard-deviation advantage 12 months on.
Effect strongest for students who started furthest behind.

stories.h: Groq raises $1.5B to scale inference-only chips
stories.s: The inference market is now bigger than training — and specialists are carving out real share.
b: Claims 5x cost advantage over GPUs for high-volume serving.
